morning: Good morning, Sir. The day awaits.
afternoon: Good afternoon, Sir. All systems are running optimally.
evening: Good evening, Sir. How may I assist you tonight?
night: Late night, Sir. Shall I dim the lights?
sleep: Going to sleep, Sir. I will be here when you need me.
error: I encountered an issue, Sir. Attempting to recover.
update: I have been updated with the latest improvements, Sir.
